metadata.siteDescription: An open, borderless community empowering Arabs in blockchain technology

hero.title: Arabs in Blockchain
hero.subtitle: Built by Arabs, open to all — empowering the Arab world to thrive in blockchain domain.

learn.title: Learn Together
learn.description: Study sessions, workshops, and live Q&As — for every level, from curious to building

meet.title: Meet & Network
meet.description: Community-run meetups across Arab countries and at major global blockchain conferences

represent.title: Arabs in Web3
represent.description: We show up at Devcon, ETHcc, DevConnect, and more — so Arabs have a voice in this space

opportunities.title: The Community Has Your Back
opportunities.intro: Since 2020, this community has put members in rooms they wouldn't have found alone.
opportunities.cultureNote: It happened because people here pay attention and pass things along. That is the culture, and it keeps going.

strip.item3: 📚  25+ free scholarships to Consensys Academy Bootcamp
strip.item4: 🌍  Connections to global Web3 learning programs
strip.note: These happened. This is who we are.

tickets.title: Free Tickets
tickets.description: We've sent members to Devcon and DevConnect. When tickets come our way, the community gets first access.

scholarships.title: Learning Opportunities
scholarships.description: We watch the ecosystem and bring the best to Arab learners. It started with 25+ free Consensys Academy scholarships.

grants.title: Grants & Funding
grants.description: Members share grant leads and support each other through applications when they come up.

jobs.title: Job Opportunities
jobs.description: Members pass along Web3 job openings and make introductions when they can.

join.title: Your People Are Here
join.subtitle: 1,000+ members across 15+ countries. Come learn, connect, and find your place in the Web3 world.

contributors.title: People Who Make It Happen
contributors.subtitle: Every event is powered by community volunteers

upcoming.title: Upcoming Events
upcoming.subtitle: Where the Arab blockchain community comes together

host.title: Want to host an event with us?

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Our story, mission, and the people behind the community

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: Arabs in Blockchain is a borderless community dedicated to advancing Arab participation in Web3. We foster education, collaboration, and opportunity for Arabic speakers and Arabs globally, helping them go from enthusiasts to leaders in the blockchain space since 2020.

speakers.title: Arabic Speakers
speakers.description: Anyone who speaks Arabic as their primary language

origin.title: Arab Origin
origin.description: People of Arab heritage from anywhere in the world

living.title: Living in Arab Countries
living.description: Anyone residing in the Arab world

timeline.title: Our Journey
timeline.2020: Founded on Facebook, LinkedIn & Discord — launched our webinar series
timeline.2021: Hosted the first Arab Blockchain Week — secured 25+ Consensys Academy scholarships — Telegram group launched, community building begins
timeline.2022: First in-person events at AUC Cairo — Web3 Wellness Day — exhibited at GITEX Tech Week Dubai — co-organized Pitch Run Arabia
timeline.2024: First side event in Cairo — introducing the concept to Egypt. First side event at a major global conference (ETHcc 7). Secured free Devcon Bangkok tickets for 20+ members, majority women and students.
timeline.2026: Hosting IRL hub for Dev3pack Hack — uniting builders in Cairo for an intense, high-energy hacking experience

community.title: Join the Community
community.subtitle: Become part of the Arab blockchain movement

step1.title: Click the Link
step1.description: Find our Telegram group link below

step3.title: Introduce Yourself!
step3.description: Tell us who you are and what you do

opportunities.title: We Open Doors
opportunities.subtitle: Resources and opportunities for our community members

tickets.title: Free Conference Tickets
tickets.description: We distribute free tickets to global Web3 conferences including Devcon, ETHcc, and more

scholarships.title: Course Scholarships
scholarships.description: Access to premium Web3 education resources and courses

grants.description: Opportunities for grants and funding for your blockchain projects

jobs.description: Curated Web3 jobs from our partner network

people.subtitle: Every event, every line of code, every stage moment — powered by community

contributors.subtitle: Developers putting in real work — PRs merged, bugs squashed, features shipped

become.subtitle: Join us in empowering the Arab blockchain community

contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you

form.name: Full Name
form.subject: Subject
form.privacy: Your information will only be used to respond to your inquiry.
form.success: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
form.error: Failed to send message. Please try again.

0xcairo-iii-security-day-2026.title: 0xCairo III: Security Day
0xcairo-iii-security-day-2026.description: A full-day security event with hands-on EVM and Solana auditing workshops, an Agentic AI Security track, and Cairo's first live Web3 CTF (Capture The Flag) competition. Limited seats — workshops and CTF available separately.
0xcairo-iii-security-day-2026.location: The Egyptian Chinese University, Nasr City, Cairo, Egypt

global-pizza-party-cairo-2026.title: 2026 Global Pizza Party Cairo
global-pizza-party-cairo-2026.description: Celebrating Bitcoin Pizza Day with the global PizzaDAO movement — free pizza, crypto conversations, and a night honoring the 10,000 BTC transaction that started it all. Co-hosted with PizzaDAO, World Pizza Champions, and ENS.
global-pizza-party-cairo-2026.location: Sedra — 90th St. Branch, New Cairo, Egypt

dev3pack-hack-cairo-2026.title: Dev3pack Hack — Cairo Hub
dev3pack-hack-cairo-2026.description: Arabs in Blockchain hosted the Cairo hub for Dev3pack Hack — bringing together local builders to collaborate, build, and compete in this global Web3 hackathon.
dev3pack-hack-cairo-2026.location: Bosla Co-working Space, Dokki, Giza, Egypt

chainlink-convergence-mixer-2026.title: Build & Connect: Chainlink Convergence Mixer
chainlink-convergence-mixer-2026.description: An evening mixer bringing together Cairo's blockchain builders for networking and discussions around the Chainlink ecosystem and Web3 development.

web3-compliance-meetup-2026.title: Build & Connect: Web3 Compliance Meetup
web3-compliance-meetup-2026.description: A focused meetup exploring regulatory frameworks, compliance challenges, and the future of legal clarity in the Web3 space — with Cairo's blockchain community.

dune-cairo-meetup-2025.title: Build & Connect: Dune Cairo Meetup
dune-cairo-meetup-2025.description: A deep dive into on-chain data analytics with Dune. Learn to query, visualize, and interpret blockchain data with Cairo's growing data community.

arab-connect-devcon-2025.title: Arab Connect @ Devconnect
arab-connect-devcon-2025.description: Our flagship side event at Devconnect in Buenos Aires — bringing together Arab builders, founders, and researchers from across the globe for an evening of connection.

road-to-sub0-cairo-2025.title: Road to sub0 — Builder Party Cairo
road-to-sub0-cairo-2025.description: A builder-focused gathering in Cairo ahead of Polkadot's sub0 conference, celebrating the local Web3 developer community and the Polkadot ecosystem.

linkup-forte-hacks-cairo-2025.title: Link.Up Cairo: Forte-Hacks Mixer
linkup-forte-hacks-cairo-2025.description: A community mixer bringing together Cairo's builders and hackers in celebration of the Forte-Hacks hackathon — networking, project showcases, and conversations.

0xcairo-bytes-zkverify-2025.title: 0xCairo Bytes: Don't Trust, zkVerify
0xcairo-bytes-zkverify-2025.description: A technical session at AUC exploring zero-knowledge proofs and the zkVerify protocol — with live demos, deep dives, and Q&A with ZK researchers.

linkup-chainlink-cairo-2025.title: Link.Up Cairo: Chromion Mixer
linkup-chainlink-cairo-2025.description: A Chainlink ecosystem mixer in Cairo, celebrating the Chromion milestone and bringing together 100+ builders from Egypt's Web3 scene.

0xcairo-tech-day-1-2024.title: 0xCairo Tech Day I
0xcairo-tech-day-1-2024.description: A full-day Web3 educational event at The Egyptian Chinese University — featuring Blockchain 101, a hands-on CCIP cross-chain workshop, real-world ZK applications, and a panel on Web3's future in Egypt.
0xcairo-tech-day-1-2024.location: The Egyptian Chinese University (ECU), Ain Shams, Cairo, Egypt

devcon-7-meetup-2024.title: الفيل في المنديل 🐘 — Arabs in Blockchain @ Devcon 7
devcon-7-meetup-2024.description: Our landmark gathering at Devcon 7 in Bangkok — over 137 Arab and Arab-allied builders came together for an unforgettable evening in Southeast Asia.

0xcairo-tech-day-2-2024.title: 0xCairo Tech Day II
0xcairo-tech-day-2-2024.description: Our second Tech Day in Cairo — a full-day event with technical talks, workshops, and demos attended by 776 builders. One of our biggest events ever.

0xcairo-meetup-2024.title: 0xCairo Meetup
0xcairo-meetup-2024.description: A relaxed community meetup for Cairo's blockchain builders — an evening of networking, knowledge sharing, and connecting with like-minded Web3 enthusiasts.

ethcc-brussels-2024.title: بلجيكا شيكا بيكا 🇧🇪 — Arabs in Blockchain @ ETHcc 7
ethcc-brussels-2024.description: Our side event at ETHcc 7 in Brussels — 78 Arab community members attending the conference gathered for an evening of connection and celebration.

cv-workshop-2024.title: Workshop: Writing an Effective Developer CV
cv-workshop-2024.description: An online workshop in Arabic helping Web3 developers craft compelling CVs and navigate the blockchain job market — practical, hands-on, and free.

bitcoin-pizza-day-cairo-2024.title: Global Pizza Party 2024 — Cairo
bitcoin-pizza-day-cairo-2024.description: Cairo's celebration of Bitcoin Pizza Day — a community gathering honoring the legendary first real-world Bitcoin transaction with pizza, talks, and networking.

ai-blockchain-brunch-cairo-2024.title: AI & Blockchain Community Brunch
ai-blockchain-brunch-cairo-2024.description: A morning brunch at The GrEEK Campus exploring the intersection of AI and blockchain — 247 attendees joined for talks, demos, and collaborative discussions.

bitcoin-pizza-day-cairo-2023.title: Cairo Bitcoin Pizza Day 2023
bitcoin-pizza-day-cairo-2023.description: Cairo's celebration of Bitcoin Pizza Day 2023 — a community gathering marking the anniversary of the first real-world Bitcoin commercial transaction.

community-call-2023.title: Monthly Community Call
community-call-2023.description: Our regular monthly community call for Arab blockchain enthusiasts — updates, open discussions, and a chance to connect with members from across the Arab world.

web3-wellness-day-2022.title: Web3 Wellness Day
web3-wellness-day-2022.description: A unique event at AUC New Cairo blending wellness and Web3 — a day of mindful workshops, blockchain talks, and community building.

arab-blockchain-week-2022.title: Arab Blockchain Week 2022
arab-blockchain-week-2022.description: The second edition of Arab Blockchain Week — a week-long virtual conference bringing together Arab blockchain builders, researchers, and community members from across the region.

arab-blockchain-week-2021.title: Arab Blockchain Week 2021 — First Edition
arab-blockchain-week-2021.description: The first edition of Arab Blockchain Week, June 12–17, 2021 — a week-long virtual conference co-hosted by the community, bringing together Arab speakers and blockchain leaders from across the region.

webinar-series-2020.title: Community Webinar Series 2020
webinar-series-2020.description: Our founding year of online webinars — the educational sessions that launched the Arab blockchain community. Watch the full series on YouTube.

eman-herawy.name: Eman Herawy
eman-herawy.bio: Founder of Arabs in Blockchain. Smart contract developer and open-source advocate building the bridge between the Arab world and global blockchain ecosystems since 2020.

bahaa-taha.name: Bahaa Ehab Taha
bahaa-taha.title: Full-Stack Blockchain Developer & Founder of Tecno Blocks
bahaa-taha.bio: Blockchain Developer with 9 years of experience. Passionate about building sites and apps, with a focus on integrating Web2 and Web3 technologies. Founder of Tecno Blocks and ardapps.

tasneem-toolba.name: Tasneem Toolba
tasneem-toolba.title: Full-Stack Web3 Developer
tasneem-toolba.bio: Full-Stack Web3 Developer and multiple hackathon winner.

ahmed-elsharabassi.name: Ahmed Elsharabassi
ahmed-elsharabassi.title: Events Manager at 1inch Network
ahmed-elsharabassi.bio: Web3 events expert with a background in Engineering and Management. MSc from TU Berlin. Managing global events at 1inch Network, the leading DeFi Aggregation Protocol.

khawla-hassan.name: Khawla Hassan
khawla-hassan.title: Technical Product Manager — Digital Assets, Blockchain & AI

hussein-hashish.name: Hussein Hashish
hussein-hashish.title: Founder & CEO at likwid
hussein-hashish.bio: Spent thirteen years in supply chain and shipping before falling down the blockchain rabbit hole in 2018. MSc in Blockchain & Digital Currencies from University of Nicosia. Founded Blockchain Hub Egypt, launched Metaversive (a Web3 advisory), and now building likwid — a blockchain-powered loyalty app.

mohammed-mahmoud.name: Mohammed Mahmoud
mohammed-mahmoud.title: Researcher at ZkLC
mohammed-mahmoud.bio: Engineer building real-world applications in crypto — including a trade finance escrow service and verifiable accounting software. Active contributor in the Mina, Starknet, Aztec, Ethereum, and Bitcoin ecosystems.

mohamed-taysir.name: Mohamed Taysir
mohamed-taysir.title: CEO at Singularity Finance
mohamed-taysir.bio: CEO of Singularity Finance, a Blockchain Fintech startup in the UAE. Active in the blockchain space since 2017, global speaker at high-level events across Egypt, Japan, UAE, USA, UK, and Africa. Certified blockchain solutions architect and instructor.

yehia-tarek.name: Yehia Tarek
yehia-tarek.title: Blockchain Engineer at Nethermind
yehia-tarek.bio: Blockchain Engineer at Nethermind, contributing to DeFi and tokenization platforms. Builds solutions in blockchain technology to improve and innovate in the financial sector.

aya-ramadan.name: Aya Ramadan Ali
aya-ramadan.title: Technical Recruiter (ex-Nethermind)
aya-ramadan.bio: Technical Recruiter, formerly at Nethermind where she helped expand their reach to over 50 countries. Connects top Web3 talent with opportunities across the globe.

ahmed-akram.name: Ahmed Akram
ahmed-akram.title: Tech Lead & Co-founder at FuzeX
ahmed-akram.bio: Seasoned software engineer and co-founder of FuzeX, serving as tech lead. Works across blockchain, full-stack development, and deep learning.

milica-vulic.name: Milica Vulic
milica-vulic.title: Developer Relations Engineer & PhD candidate in ZK
milica-vulic.bio: Developer Relations Engineer at zkVerify and Horizen, and a PhD candidate specialising in Zero Knowledge Proofs. With over 8 years of experience as a developer and working in Web3 since 2018, she crafts developer-first content, tutorials, and workshops that make ZK approachable and practical for builders.

al-qaqaa.name: Al-Qa'qa'
al-qaqaa.title: Web3 Security Researcher
al-qaqaa.bio: EVM smart contract auditor and Web3 security researcher who secures smart contracts to avoid loss of funds.

frank-castle.name: Frank Castle
frank-castle.title: Rust/Solana Security Auditor
frank-castle.bio: Professional smart contract security researcher with focused expertise in auditing Rust-based programs and decentralized infrastructure across leading blockchain ecosystems, with 2 years of experience in Solana programs auditing.

rami-khalil.name: Rami Khalil
rami-khalil.title: Blockchain Protocol Engineer at Boundless
rami-khalil.bio: Formally studied Blockchain protocols at Imperial College London for his PhD, and at ETH Zurich for his MSc. Has been developing ZK protocols at RISC Zero/Boundless for the past three years.

mohamed-fouda.name: Dr. Mohamed Fouda
mohamed-fouda.title: Tech Builder & Investor — Building financial products for Muslims worldwide
mohamed-fouda.bio: Researcher and engineer with extensive experience in blockchain, cryptocurrency consensus mechanisms, and economics. PhD graduate from Northwestern University. Author of numerous technical and economic articles on blockchain.

hassan-imam.name: Hassan Imam
hassan-imam.title: Blockchain Researcher & Educator
hassan-imam.bio: M.Sc. in International Relations from Aydin University, with a thesis on blockchain technology and the future of US power in international relations. Researcher in blockchain social impact with articles and educational videos published on the الفلاشاية platform.

soha-safwat.name: Dr. Soha Safwat
soha-safwat.title: Dean, Faculty of Computers and Information Systems — Egyptian Chinese University

wes-saunders.name: Weslye Saunders
wes-saunders.title: NFL Veteran & Spiritual Life Advisor
wes-saunders.bio: National Football League veteran, formerly of the Pittsburgh Steelers and Indianapolis Colts. Holistic trainer, certified instructor with the International Institute of Sport & Movement, and emotional intelligence coach. Explores social solutions through Web3.

laman-mohamed.name: Laman Mohamed
laman-mohamed.title: Head of Metaverse & AI at Egyptian Geographic | PhD Researcher
laman-mohamed.bio: Head of the Metaverse and Artificial Intelligence Sector at the Egyptian Foundation for the Simplification of Science (Egyptian Geographic). PhD researcher in virtual and augmented reality.

christine-lewis.name: Christine Lewis
christine-lewis.title: The Yoga Boss — Founder of Yog8 DAO
christine-lewis.bio: Known as The Yoga Boss after teaching Transformational Yoga Therapy since 2009 to founders of multi-billion-dollar companies and professional athletes. Launched a Yoga DAO to democratize access to yoga and meditation through Web3 incentives. Creator of Yoga Boss NFTs and the Yog8 DAO wellness metaverse.

eiman-abdelmoneim.name: Eiman Abdelmoneim
eiman-abdelmoneim.title: Staff Engineer, Applied AI @ Nebula | ex-thirdweb
eiman-abdelmoneim.bio: Staff Engineer in Applied AI at Nebula, owning the AI-native middle of the funnel across forward-deployed engineering, product, and customer success. Previously at thirdweb.

mohammad-tayel.name: Mohammad Tayel
mohammad-tayel.title: LLM, MLRO @ Western Union | Co-Founder @ Qistaschain

youssef-kamal.name: Youssef Kamal
youssef-kamal.title: CEO at Euclid Solutions | Founder of People of Data
youssef-kamal.bio: Holds three master's degrees. Established data science and AI teams for various startups and founded a data science & AI consultancy. AI tutor at Udacity and founder of the People of Data community.

tarry-singh.name: Tarry Singh
tarry-singh.title: Board Director & AI Researcher at Real AI Inc. & DK AI Lab
tarry-singh.bio: Over 25 years in Data. Chairman & CEO of DK AI Holding, co-founder of Real AI (enterprise AI) and Earthscan.io (energy AI). All companies are part of the NVIDIA Inception Program.

shaheen-ahmed.name: Shaheen Ahmed
shaheen-ahmed.title: Developer Advocate at Cartesi
shaheen-ahmed.bio: Developer Advocacy Contributor at Cartesi — manages Discord, judges hackathons, prototypes ideas, and builds developer relationships. Background in Computer Science from VIT-Vellore; focused on decentralized protocols and full-stack Ethereum applications.

elif-hilal.name: Elif Hilal Umucu
elif-hilal.title: DevRel (ex-Chainlink Labs)
elif-hilal.bio: Elif developed a personal alphabet at age 10, igniting her passion for cryptography. By 17, she founded a global organization for blockchain enthusiasts and worked on blockchain projects at the Turkish Presidency Digital Transformation Office while in university. Her work spans smart contracts, digital identities, and blockchain innovation.
